description: Legal document. Bill of divorce, Alexandria (referred to as No-Amon). Dated: 22 Tammuz 1461 (18 July 1150). This bill of divorce is one of forty under the T-S 10J2 shelfmark. The divorce is between Baqā b. Shemuel and Ṭalb bt. Yiṣḥaq. The witnesses are Yiṣḥaq b. Yūsuf and Surūr b. Avraham. The verso contains the acceptance of the bill of divorce by the wife, signed also by Yiṣḥaq b. Yūsuf and Surūr b. Avraham. (Information from Goitein's index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
